case_title: BANK OF AMERICA N.A. (USA) VS GALINDEZ, FREDERICK G.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,397.00 FILED BY BANK OF AMERICA N.A. (USA) AS TO DEFENDANT GALINDEZ, FREDERICK G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N.A. (USA) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALINDEZ, FREDERICK G. $2,347.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,437.00, PLAINTIFF TO PAY $147.50 BY 10/27/00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
